title: FDE operating lifecycle payload
description: Extension shape for STATUS.json and evidence artifacts. Used by CRSP-FDE-CTRL-PLANE-LIFECYCLE-001.

last_transition_evidence_path.description: Repo-relative path to evidence JSON proving last transition.

unresolved_inputs.description: e.g. UNRESOLVED REQUIRED INPUT for standalone twin path.

human_ratification.description: Required for STABILIZE to OPERATE; ticket id or maintainer record.

note.description: Non-normative annotation; not a substitute for required evidence fields.
